reason: Former name of the facility at 15060 US-641 S, Holladay TN 38341 (I-40 Exit 126); now operating as ONE9 Travel Center #1366, which is included. Excluded as a duplicate/legacy listing.

iExit and Roadnow confirm no trucker-relevant facilities at Exit 116 (TN-114 Natchez Trace: 0 gas/0 food/0 hotels), Exit 93 (2 small gas stations only, no truck services verified), or Exit 133 (Birdsong Rd: 1 small gas station 2+ miles off-exit, no truck services).
Reported closed - Yelp (updated June 2026) marks this I-40 Exit 355 location as CLOSED and it no longer appears on Pilot's TN locations page; legacy directory listings are stale.
